_comment: Corrected routing-model benchmark case study with real Haiku, Opus, Synthetic small, and Codex default fixture results.

scenes.lede: The earlier report was not benchmark evidence.
scenes.body: This version uses live kitsoki test intents runs against the same Oregon Trail room fixture. The result is negative: no tested model passes the room threshold.

scenes.lede: The models usually found the right intent name.
scenes.body: They failed because the validated slot payloads did not match the room contract. Routing benchmarks must score the full intent call, not just the label.

scenes.lede: Synthetic small runs through the live Anthropic-compatible profile.
scenes.body: The corrected command is --harness live --profile synthetic-claude --claude-model syn:small:text. Running syn:small:text through Codex/ChatGPT is the wrong provider path.

scenes.lede: Do not promote a cheaper router for this room.
scenes.body: The cost-saving mechanism remains valid, but this room needs prompt/schema work or a different routing strategy before model promotion.
